reasoning:
FIDE releases official ratings exactly once a month (on the 1st), and the Wikipedia page updates to reflect these monthly lists. Therefore, the rating listed on Nov 16 will use the exact same FIDE list as Nov 9, resulting in a 0% change. Minor probability (5%) is reserved for Wikipedia anomalies or delayed updates. 
To achieve a 1% increase (roughly +28 Elo points to reach >2817/2833 depending on his exact Nov rating), Caruana would need to go on an extraordinary undefeated winning streak against elite competition over the subsequent months. Gaining 28 points in one month (by Dec 9) or three months (by Feb 7) for a top-3 player is exceptionally rare. A ~6-8% probability reflects the base rate of such massive rating jumps for ~2800-rated players.
